feed.title: whimsysoul
feed.subtitle: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from whimsysoul

entry.title: First time in Amsterdam itinerary for day 1! Walked 7 miles today which didn't feel the best on my jet lagged body but this city is too cute 🇳🇱🌷🧡 #amsterdam #netherlands #amsterdamcity #amsterdamguide #redlightdistrict🚨🚨🚨 #cats #amsterdamfood #willtravelf
entry.content: First time in Amsterdam itinerary for day 1! Walked 7 miles today which didn't feel the best on my jet lagged body but this city is too cute 🇳🇱🌷🧡 #amsterdam #netherlands #amsterdamcity #amsterdamguide #redlightdistrict🚨🚨🚨 #cats #amsterdamfood #willtravelf

entry.title: Amsterdam I have questions about the eggs 🥚 but loved seeing all the different things in your grocery stores! 🧡🥕 #amsterdam #amsterdam🇳🇱 #amsterdamcity #grocerystore #netherlands #holland #dutch #whimsysoul #albertheijn #iamsterdam
entry.content: Amsterdam I have questions about the eggs 🥚 but loved seeing all the different things in your grocery stores! 🧡🥕 #amsterdam #amsterdam🇳🇱 #amsterdamcity #grocerystore #netherlands #holland #dutch #whimsysoul #albertheijn #iamsterdam

entry.title: the BEST way to view Dutch tulips 🌷👇 It's our first time to Amsterdam and we happen to be visiting during the famous Dutch tulip season!! Getting out of the city to see the tulip fields isn't the easiest but I found an amazing tour you need to know about!
entry.content: the BEST way to view Dutch tulips 🌷👇 It's our first time to Amsterdam and we happen to be visiting during the famous Dutch tulip season!! Getting out of the city to see the tulip fields isn't the easiest but I found an amazing tour you need to know about!

entry.title: I'm in Europe for a month, here's what I wore in Amsterdam today 🌷🇳🇱 (curvy size 12/14!) Last day in Amsterdam we walked all over, saw the Anne Frank house and did a canal tour! I wore this cozy sweater and skirt in the morning but tbd changed in the even
entry.content: I'm in Europe for a month, here's what I wore in Amsterdam today 🌷🇳🇱 (curvy size 12/14!) Last day in Amsterdam we walked all over, saw the Anne Frank house and did a canal tour! I wore this cozy sweater and skirt in the morning but tbd changed in the even

entry.title: cool things to do in Amsterdam on your first visit 👇 🌷 see the Dutch tulips (if you're visiting during their ~6 week window of bloom!) we did an airbnb experience tour and loved it! 🍪 Try Stroopwafel, either get a pack at a store or go to a local street
entry.content: cool things to do in Amsterdam on your first visit 👇 🌷 see the Dutch tulips (if you're visiting during their ~6 week window of bloom!) we did an airbnb experience tour and loved it! 🍪 Try Stroopwafel, either get a pack at a store or go to a local street

entry.title: I love Danish grocery stores 😭 they're obsessed with rhubarb as much as i am #denmark #danish #dansk #netto #copenhagen #copenhagentiktok #denmark🇩🇰 #kobenhavn #groceryshopping #whimsysoul #rhubarb
entry.content: I love Danish grocery stores 😭 they're obsessed with rhubarb as much as i am #denmark #danish #dansk #netto #copenhagen #copenhagentiktok #denmark🇩🇰 #kobenhavn #groceryshopping #whimsysoul #rhubarb

entry.title: Nobody in my country knows about Eurovision but I'm obsessed 😝 what's your favorite song this year? #eurovision #eurovison2024 #eurovisionsongcontest
entry.content: Nobody in my country knows about Eurovision but I'm obsessed 😝 what's your favorite song this year? #eurovision #eurovison2024 #eurovisionsongcontest

entry.title: OMG we're ready for you to visit! 😱 Book a stay at the Whimsy Homes cabin - my Airbnb listing link is in my bio 🥰 @Whimsy Homes Cabin I’ve spent all year renovating my old cabin in Arnold, California to turn it from meh to amazing and I can’t believe it’

entry.title: Ditch the sad beige, find your magic! ⭐️ Join me for hidden gems around California & the world, colorful outfits, definitely too much wine and tons of whimsy from your neighborhood ginger. (P.S. there’s a cabin…) @Whimsy Homes Cabin Oh, and more bingo. I

entry.title: Replying to @seanlawn breaking news! Second square is off the world cruise bingo card! Shoutout to @joe for alerting us today. What square do we think will be next? #ultimateworldcruise #worldcruise #bingo #worldcruisebingo #whimysoul #royalcaribbean #cr
